productDisplayName: UCB Men's Polo Neck With Lion Logo Red T-shirt
description: CompositionRed polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed collar and cuffs, buttoned rugged placket, vented shirt side ends and embroidered lion emblem on left chest, embroidered Italian flag on right chest, and numbers 19 and 65 embroidered on the sleevesFittingComfortWash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not tumble dry Do not wring Do not bleach Do not dry clean Do not dry in direct sunlight Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Subtle and stylish, this red polo neck t-shirt from the united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The thickly embroidered lion logo, the Italian flag and the number 1965 split across the sleeves pay homage to the year of commencement and the brand's country of origin. The ribbed sleeve hems contour your well-toned arms perfectly, while the slits at the shirt ends offer a comfortable Fit. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
